app.name: Telugu E-Newspaper
app.tagline: Breaking Telugu News, Reels & Live TV — One App

features.name: News Feed
features.description: Primary home feed showing categorized Telugu news articles fetched from Supabase in real time. Cards include headline, image, source avatar (channel logo), category badge, timestamp, fact-check badge, and a pinned action bar. Supports offline fallback from local cache with age banner.
interactions: Tap card → open source URL in in-app browser with haptic feedback
Pull-to-refresh → refetch latest articles
Like button → local toggle with haptic
Bookmark button → local toggle (persisted to saved list)
WhatsApp share → open WhatsApp with title + URL
Native share → system share sheet
Send to Chat → save draft to AsyncStorage, open chat tab
Follow Reporter → toggle follow state, update reporter_follows table
Sort dropdown → switch between Latest / Trending / Most Liked
card_fields: description (80-word Gemini summary from ingest pipeline)
reporter_avatar_url (falls back to live_channels.logo_url by source_name match)

verified_badge.style: blue circle #1d9bf0 with checkmark, overlapping source avatar corner

features.offline_behavior: Show cached articles (max 200, max age 24h) with offline banner showing cache age

features.name: Speed News (Stories Mode)
features.description: Instagram Stories–style full-screen card carousel showing the top 10 most recent news items. Each card has a gradient background (category-coloured), headline, brief summary, source, and progress bars per item. Opens as a bottom sheet modal from the 'Speed' category chip.
interactions: Tap left third → go to previous card
Tap right third → go to next card
Swipe left/right → navigate cards (28% screen width threshold)
Auto-advance every 8 seconds with animated progress bars
Pause on swipe gesture start
Read full article button → open source URL
Share button → native share sheet
Close button → dismiss modal
Final card shows 'All caught up!' completion screen

features.name: Category Filtering
features.description: Horizontal scrollable pill-shaped chip bar at the top of the news feed and reels screen. Each chip filters the feed to a category. Tapping 'Speed' opens Speed News modal instead of filtering. Tapping 'Following' requires auth and loads reporter subscriptions.
interactions: Tap chip → filter feed to that category
Tap Speed → open Speed News modal
Tap Following → load followed reporter IDs then filter

features.name: Full-Text Search
features.description: Global news search modal accessible from the header. Uses Supabase PostgreSQL full-text search (WFTS via search_vector tsvector column with GIN index) for fast, accurate results. Shows title, category badge, and source per result.
interactions: Autofocus search input on modal open
Type query → results appear
Tap result → navigate to /news/[id]
Cancel button → dismiss modal
Keyboard dismiss on drag

features.name: News Detail / Article View
features.description: Opens the full source article in an in-app browser (Expo WebBrowser). Accessed by tapping any news card. Tracks article open analytics event with category and source.
interactions: Tap news card → haptic feedback + open source URL in in-app browser
Browser has back/close/share controls

features.name: Video Reels (YouTube Shorts)
features.description: TikTok/Instagram Reels–style full-screen vertical video feed of Telugu news YouTube Shorts. Lazy-loads YouTube embeds for visible and adjacent items only. Supports swipe-to-next, action bar, reporter follows, polls, and sharing.
features.channel_picker_modal: searchable list of channels from live_channels table
actions: Send to Chat → save share draft, open chat tab

features.name: Live TV Channels
features.description: Browse and watch live Telugu news channels. Sticky embedded YouTube player at top. Channel list with live/offline/featured badges. Tap any channel to switch stream. Supports filter chips by channel name.
interactions: Tap channel row → load that channel's video_id in player
Filter chip → filter visible channels by name
Play/Stop button → toggle playback in embedded player
Watch on YouTube button → open official_url in browser

features.name: Direct Messaging (Chat)
features.description: 1-to-1 real-time direct messaging between authenticated users. Supports text, image (ephemeral: once-view or 24h), and share-card messages (news/reel/live channel). Auth wall gates access. Online presence indicators. Transactional outbox ensures push notification delivery.

resilience.idempotency: client_tag UUID (RFC4122 v4) prevents duplicate writes
resilience.rate_limiting: client-side AsyncStorage buckets per action type
resilience.outbox_pattern: message_outbox table + outbox-worker edge function ensures push delivery

interactions: Auth wall → sign up / sign in with email + password
User list → search by name, tap to open conversation
Send text message → rate-limited, idempotent, real-time delivery
Send share card (news/reel/live) → mini card with title + thumbnail + tap-to-open
Send image → once-view or 24h ephemeral (coming soon)
Tap shared news card → open source URL
Tap shared reel → navigate to reels
Online dot → shows is_online status
Share pending banner → shows when share draft from news/reels is waiting to be sent

features.name: Reporter / Creator Portal
features.description: Content creator portal for uploading user-generated news articles and YouTube Shorts reels. Requires separate email/password login. Reporters can manage (edit/delete) their own posts. Uploaded content appears in the main news feed and reels feed tagged with reporter info.

auth.note: Reporter login is independent of chat/main app auth

news_upload_fields: image (image picker → uploaded to reporter-news-images bucket)
reel_upload_fields: youtube_shorts_url (validated: must be YouTube Shorts format)
interactions: Sign up / sign in as reporter
Edit reporter bio and display name
Upload news article with image
Upload reel with YouTube Shorts URL
Edit existing post
Delete post with confirmation

features.name: Follow Reporters
features.description: Users can follow/unfollow news reporters. Followed reporters' articles appear in the 'Following' category. Self-follow is blocked. Follower count displayed on reporter cards. Rate-limited to prevent spam.
interactions: Follow button → toggle follow, update reporter_follows table
Unfollow button → remove from reporter_follows
Following category chip → filter feed to followed reporters' articles

features.name: Push Notifications
features.description: Expo-powered push notifications with per-category opt-in toggles. Notification tap routes the user to the relevant screen (news, reels, live). Local test notifications available from settings. Outbox worker handles server-side push delivery.

local_notifications.breaking_news_demo: sample breaking news notification for testing

platform_notes.expo_go: Remote push disabled in SDK 53+; local notifications work
platform_notes.android: Sound + badge + alert + banner + list enabled

interactions: Toggle per-category switch → save pref to AsyncStorage
Send Breaking News test → immediate local notification
Send Morning Digest test → delayed local notification
View push token → copy-able for testing

features.name: Offline Caching
features.description: AsyncStorage-backed offline cache for news and reels. When network is unavailable, the app shows cached content with an offline banner displaying cache age. News cache holds 200 articles max with 24h TTL. Reels cache holds 80 items. Chat share drafts are also persisted for resumption.

async_storage_keys: offline_news_ts_v2 (ISO timestamp of last cache write)

interactions: Automatic fallback on network error
Retry button on offline banner → manual refetch
Cache updates silently on every successful fetch

features.name: User Profile & Settings
features.description: Profile hub screen with navigation to all settings sub-screens. Covers account info, chat privacy, notification preferences, display settings, language, legal, and account actions. Settings are persisted to AsyncStorage.

edit_profile_fields.display_name: free text, stored in chat_users + AsyncStorage

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Supabase email/password authentication. Session persisted to AsyncStorage with auto-refresh. Auth gates access to chat, reporter studio, reporter follow, and Following category. Sign-out clears session.
interactions: Sign up with email + password + display name + username
Sign in with email + password
Sign out → clears session, returns to unauthenticated state
Auth state change → updates global auth context

features.name: Saved / Bookmarks
features.description: Bookmark news articles for later reading. Currently shows an empty state with a 'Browse News' CTA. DB persistence and sync planned for future release.
planned_features: Save article to local AsyncStorage bookmarks list
Sync bookmarks to Supabase user_bookmarks table
interactions: Bookmark button in news card action bar → saves article
Browse News button in empty state → navigate to news feed

features.name: Viewing History
features.description: Shows recently viewed news articles and reels. Currently powered by mock data — not persisted to DB or AsyncStorage. Delete and clear-all actions work in-memory only within the session.
features.current_limitations: Mock data only — not persisted across app sessions
planned_features: Persist view history to AsyncStorage on article/reel open
Sync history to Supabase user_history table
interactions: Tap history item → open article or reel
Delete icon → remove from list (in-memory)
Clear all button → empty the list

features.name: Analytics & Telemetry
features.description: Dual-provider analytics system. PostHog tracks product events (user behaviour, feature adoption). Sentry captures errors and crashes. Both are env-key gated — silent no-ops in dev when keys are absent.

events.name: news_shared
events.trigger: User shares an article via any channel

events.name: breaking_news_tapped
events.trigger: User taps a breaking news notification

features.name: Server-Side News Ingestion
features.description: Automated server-side pipeline running as a Supabase Edge Function. Fetches RSS feeds, scrapes full article text, summarizes to 75-80 words using Gemini 2.5 Flash, deduplicates, and inserts into news_updates. Also cleans up articles older than 24 hours. Triggered by cron with secret header.
pipeline_steps: 2. Fetch active RSS sources from rss_sources table
3. Parse RSS XML: extract title, link, description, image (media:content / enclosure / og:image)
4. Fetch full HTML from source URL (User-Agent: TeluguENewspaperBot/1.0)
5. Extract article body: article/main tags → paragraphs → meta description
6. Summarize to 75-80 words using Gemini 2.5 Flash (fallback: truncate)
7. Insert into news_updates with UNIQUE(source_url) conflict = ignore
8. Backfill: update articles from last 24h that have long descriptions
9. Auto-cleanup: delete articles older than 24 hours

gemini_integration.prompt: Summarize to 75-80 words in source language, factual and concise
gemini_integration.api_key_location: Supabase Edge Secret GEMINI_API_KEY (NOT in client code)
gemini_integration.fallback: truncate to 80 words if API unavailable

request_params.dryRun: boolean — run without writing to DB

outbox_worker.name: outbox-worker
outbox_worker.purpose: Drain message_outbox table and deliver push notifications via Expo push service
